history.text: Write a highly detailed, descriptive prompt of this image in English for an AI text-to-image generator (such as Midjourney, DALL-E, or Stable Diffusion). Describe the objects, background, style, lighting, color palette, and mood in detail. Do NOT include any introductory or concluding conversational text. Do not say 'Here is the prompt' or similar. Output ONLY the raw description of the image.

A young East Asian woman with long, dark hair and bangs is taking a mirror selfie. She is wearing a white, short-sleeved top with a textured, embroidered pattern and a matching delicate necklace. Her lower half is clad in loose-fitting, vertically striped pants in shades of grey and white. In her left hand, she holds a clear plastic cup with a straw, containing a vibrant green beverage. Her right hand is raised, holding a smartphone with a white case featuring a black camera bump and a circular cutout, possibly for a magnetic attachment. The background appears to be a wall with a wood-grain texture, possibly in a hallway or dressing room, with a large reflective surface, likely a mirror or glass panel, occupying the right side of the frame. Above the wood-grain wall, in the reflection, faint text in Chinese characters is visible on a white surface, suggesting signage. The lighting is soft and even, illuminating the woman and her surroundings without harsh shadows. The overall color palette is muted and natural, with dominant tones of beige, white, grey, and green. The mood is casual and relaxed, with the woman's gentle gaze and pose conveying a sense of quiet confidence. The image has a slightly dreamy or artistic quality, possibly due to post-processing or the camera's lens.
